TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Tsou, story: Tsou-frog-story-wang-1
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: mo cihi ci oko eh mo tʉtpʉtʉ to fo'kunge.
S.PHON: mo ʦihi ʦi oko eh mo tɨtpɨtɨ to foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: mo cihi ci oko eh mo tʉtpʉtʉ to fo'kunge.
S.PHON: mo ʦihi ʦi oko eh mo tɨtpɨtɨ to foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 一個小孩捉了一隻青蛙.
A child caught a frog.

S.FORM: isi teapha to pania.
S.PHON: isi teapha to pania.
S.FORM: isi teapha to pania.
S.PHON: isi teapha to pania.

TRANSL.notes: 他(把牠)裝在一個瓶子裡.

S.TRANSL: 他 裝在一個瓶子裡.
He put it in a container.

S.FORM: uhm micu eofona micu oegʉtʉ 'e oko.
S.PHON: uhm miʦu eofona miʦu oe*ɨtɨ ʔe oko.
S.FORM: uhm micu eofona micu oegʉtʉ 'e oko.
S.PHON: uhm miʦu eofona miʦu oe*ɨtɨ ʔe oko.
S.TRANSL: 晚上了,小孩睡了.
At that night, the child went to sleep.

S.FORM: ma mo aasoe eh pkaako 'e pania 'ia pkaako 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ma mo aasoe eh pkaako ʔe pania ʔia pkaako ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: ma mo aasoe eh pkaako 'e pania 'ia pkaako 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: ma mo aasoe eh pkaako ʔe pania ʔia pkaako ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 瓶子..不, 是青蛙偷偷的逃走了.
The frog escaped stealthily from the container.

S.FORM: micu yʉc'ʉ ne micu taseona ihe aiti.
S.PHON: miʦu jɨʦʔɨ ne miʦu taseona ihe aiti.
S.FORM: micu yʉc'ʉ ne micu taseona ihe aiti.
S.PHON: miʦu jɨʦʔɨ ne miʦu taseona ihe aiti.
S.TRANSL: 他早上起來看到..

TRANSL.notes: (He) got up in the morning, and see...

S.TRANSL: got up in the morning, and see...

S.FORM: eN 'iama pkaako 'o eh fo'kunge.
S.PHON: en ʔiama pkaako ʔo eh foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: eN 'iama pkaako 'o eh fo'kunge.
S.PHON: en ʔiama pkaako ʔo eh foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他看到青蛙逃走了
He saw that the frog had escaped.

S.FORM: ihe cu eh i'ima i'ima ta aemana ho acʉha top'op'eni 'e mo mav'ov'o ci macucuma ho.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu eh iʔima iʔima ta aemana ho aʦɨha topʔopʔeni ʔe mo mavʔovʔo ʦi maʦuʦuma ho.
S.FORM: ihe cu eh i'ima i'ima ta aemana ho acʉha top'op'eni 'e mo mav'ov'o ci macucuma ho.
S.PHON: ihe ʦu eh iʔima iʔima ta aemana ho aʦɨha topʔopʔeni ʔe mo mavʔovʔo ʦi maʦuʦuma ho.
S.TRANSL: 他們在房子裡面找, 他把很多容器翻過來找.

TRANSL.notes: They looked for the frog (everywhere) inside the house. They turned every container over and looked for (the frog).

S.TRANSL: They looked for the frog inside the house. They turned every container over and looked for .

S.FORM: ihe ta'unano mo nooyo.
S.PHON: ihe taʔunano mo noojo.
S.FORM: ihe ta'unano mo nooyo.
S.PHON: ihe taʔunano mo noojo.
S.TRANSL: 他們以為青蛙在那些容器裡面.

TRANSL.notes: He thought (the frog) was inside (of the containers).

S.TRANSL: He thought was inside .

S.FORM: eN isi yuoeva ta av'usi 'e pania pania ci osi yoni to.
S.PHON: en isi juoeva ta avʔusi ʔe pania pania ʦi osi joni to.
S.FORM: eN isi yuoeva ta av'usi 'e pania pania ci osi yoni to.
S.PHON: en isi juoeva ta avʔusi ʔe pania pania ʦi osi joni to.
S.TRANSL: 他的狗把牠的頭塞進原來裝青蛙的瓶子裡面.
His dog inserted its head inside the container where the frog had been.

S.FORM: 'a isi teolʉi na fo'kunge hoci n'a eh nooyo.
S.PHON: ʔa isi teoɗɨi na foʔkuŋe hoʦi nʔa eh noojo.
S.FORM: 'a isi teolʉi na fo'kunge hoci n'a eh nooyo.
S.PHON: ʔa isi teoɗɨi na foʔkuŋe hoʦi nʔa eh noojo.
S.TRANSL: 他沒看到青蛙在裡面.

TRANSL.notes: (He) didn't see the frog inside.

S.TRANSL: didn't see the frog inside.

S.FORM: eh micu m'oh'ʉtʉ ta pethʉ'ta ho eoho'a 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: eh miʦu mʔohʔɨtɨ ta pethɨʔta ho eohoʔa ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: eh micu m'oh'ʉtʉ ta pethʉ'ta ho eoho'a 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: eh miʦu mʔohʔɨtɨ ta pethɨʔta ho eohoʔa ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他把頭往窗外伸呼叫這隻青蛙.
He headed out of the window and called the frog.

S.FORM: um moso maezo eh m'oh'ʉtʉ 'e av'u ho m to pania 'o fnguusi.
S.PHON: um moso maezo eh mʔohʔɨtɨ ʔe avʔu ho m to pania ʔo fŋuusi.
S.FORM: um moso maezo eh m'oh'ʉtʉ 'e av'u ho m to pania 'o fnguusi.
S.PHON: um moso maezo eh mʔohʔɨtɨ ʔe avʔu ho m to pania ʔo fŋuusi.
S.TRANSL: 狗也跟著往外伸出頭, 牠的頭是在瓶子裡
The dog whose head had been inserted inside the container also headed out.

S.FORM: uh mo supeohʉ ta pethu'ta 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: uh mo supeohɨ ta pethuʔta ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: uh mo supeohʉ ta pethu'ta 'e fo'kunge.
S.PHON: uh mo supeohɨ ta pethuʔta ʔe foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙從窗戶掉下去.
The frog fell by the window.

S.FORM: micu eh uh ta peohnasi 'e oko ho eh pasaha 'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʦu eh uh ta peohnasi ʔe oko ho eh pasaha ʔe avʔu.
S.FORM: micu eh uh ta peohnasi 'e oko ho eh pasaha 'e av'u.
S.PHON: miʦu eh uh ta peohnasi ʔe oko ho eh pasaha ʔe avʔu.
S.TRANSL: 男孩去窗戶底下抱起狗.
The boy went underneath the window and held the dog.

S.FORM: micu yuyuso 'e av'u ho ihe cu aoka eoho'a 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu jujuso ʔe avʔu ho ihe ʦu aoka eohoʔa ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: micu yuyuso 'e av'u ho ihe cu aoka eoho'a 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: miʦu jujuso ʔe avʔu ho ihe ʦu aoka eohoʔa ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 小孩跟狗在一起, 一直叫青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: (The child) together with the dog, repeatedly called the frog.

S.TRANSL: together with the dog, repeatedly called the frog.

S.FORM: eh eh i in ipopoha i'ima.
S.PHON: eh eh i in ipopoha iʔima.
S.FORM: eh eh i in ipopoha i'ima.
S.PHON: eh eh i in ipopoha iʔima.
S.TRANSL: 他們兩個一起去找青蛙.

TRANSL.notes: They went to look for (the frog) together.

S.TRANSL: They went to look for together.

S.FORM: um nemio mo m'ooyo to na ito feongo 'o oko ho eh na iho teʉ'tʉmi 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: um nemio mo mʔoojo to na ito feoŋo ʔo oko ho eh na iho teɨʔtɨmi ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: um nemio mo m'ooyo to na ito feongo 'o oko ho eh na iho teʉ'tʉmi 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: um nemio mo mʔoojo to na ito feoŋo ʔo oko ho eh na iho teɨʔtɨmi ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 那時候, 小孩頭伸進去洞裡找青蛙.
At that time, the child headed into the hole and looked for the frog.

S.FORM: mo eh m'oyafo si eh buhci ceoa ho.
S.PHON: mo eh mʔojafo si eh ɓuhʦi ʦeoa ho.
S.FORM: mo eh m'oyafo si eh buhci ceoa ho.
S.PHON: mo eh mʔojafo si eh ɓuhʦi ʦeoa ho.

TRANSL.notes: 一隻老鼠從地裡往外伸出(身體).

S.TRANSL: 一隻老鼠從地裡往外伸出 .
A mouse came out from the ground.

S.FORM: eh na iho yu'hanga 'e oko.
S.PHON: eh na iho juʔhaŋa ʔe oko.
S.FORM: eh na iho yu'hanga 'e oko.
S.PHON: eh na iho juʔhaŋa ʔe oko.
S.TRANSL: 那老鼠討厭那小孩.

TRANSL.notes: (The mouse) did not like the child.

S.TRANSL: did not like the child.

S.FORM: eh i'o av'u isi eh aiti 'o ceoyu ci mo tmiehi isi cu taʉza 'e ceoyu.
S.PHON: eh iʔo avʔu isi eh aiti ʔo ʦeoju ʦi mo tmiehi isi ʦu taɨza ʔe ʦeoju.
S.FORM: eh i'o av'u isi eh aiti 'o ceoyu ci mo tmiehi isi cu taʉza 'e ceoyu.
S.PHON: eh iʔo avʔu isi eh aiti ʔo ʦeoju ʦi mo tmiehi isi ʦu taɨza ʔe ʦeoju.
S.TRANSL: 狗看見吊掛在樹上的蜂窩就搖那蜂窩.

TRANSL.notes: The dog saw a bee(hive) hanging (down) and shook it.

S.TRANSL: The dog saw a bee hanging and shook it.

S.FORM: taʉza ta av'u eh ceoyu ho isi cu tapeoha em i'e oko mo capo ta evi ho m'ooyo to eN feongo to evi ho i'ima 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: taɨza ta avʔu eh ʦeoju ho isi ʦu tapeoha em iʔe oko mo ʦapo ta evi ho mʔoojo to en feoŋo to evi ho iʔima ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: taʉza ta av'u eh ceoyu ho isi cu tapeoha em i'e oko mo capo ta evi ho m'ooyo to eN feongo to evi ho i'ima 'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: taɨza ta avʔu eh ʦeoju ho isi ʦu tapeoha em iʔe oko mo ʦapo ta evi ho mʔoojo to en feoŋo to evi ho iʔima ʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上那棵樹,把頭伸進樹洞裡找青蛙.
The child climbed a tree and looked for the frog inside a hole.

S.FORM: nemio 'e ne 'e oko eh ne mo m'ooyo to feongo.
S.PHON: nemio ʔe ne ʔe oko eh ne mo mʔoojo to feoŋo.
S.FORM: nemio 'e ne 'e oko eh ne mo m'ooyo to feongo.
S.PHON: nemio ʔe ne ʔe oko eh ne mo mʔoojo to feoŋo.

TRANSL.notes: 那時候這個小孩(頭)伸進洞裡面.

S.TRANSL: 那時候這個小孩 伸進洞裡面.

TRANSL.notes: When the child inserted (his head) into the hole,

S.TRANSL: When the child inserted into the hole,

S.FORM: 'iama mo nooyo 'o na i'o puku.
S.PHON: ʔiama mo noojo ʔo na iʔo puku.
S.FORM: 'iama mo nooyo 'o na i'o puku.
S.PHON: ʔiama mo noojo ʔo na iʔo puku.
S.TRANSL: 原來那個貓頭鷹在樹洞裡面.

TRANSL.notes: (It was) an owl (inside the tree).

S.TRANSL: an owl .

S.FORM: um mo yamci 'e oko ho oh na iho supeohʉ supeohʉ ta evi.
S.PHON: um mo jamʦi ʔe oko ho oh na iho supeohɨ supeohɨ ta evi.
S.FORM: um mo yamci 'e oko ho oh na iho supeohʉ supeohʉ ta evi.
S.PHON: um mo jamʦi ʔe oko ho oh na iho supeohɨ supeohɨ ta evi.
S.TRANSL: 小孩嚇到了從樹上掉下來.
The child got frightened and fell down.

S.FORM: eN maica ho isi taʉza to av'u 'o na i'o ceoyu 'a isi tapeoha ho micu mee aemo' 'e ceoyu ho meobango ta isi cu peobanga 'e av'u.
S.PHON: en maiʦa ho isi taɨza to avʔu ʔo na iʔo ʦeoju ʔa isi tapeoha ho miʦu mee aemoʔ ʔe ʦeoju ho meoɓaŋo ta isi ʦu peoɓaŋa ʔe avʔu.
S.FORM: eN maica ho isi taʉza to av'u 'o na i'o ceoyu 'a isi tapeoha ho micu mee aemo' 'e ceoyu ho meobango ta isi cu peobanga 'e av'u.
S.PHON: en maiʦa ho isi taɨza to avʔu ʔo na iʔo ʦeoju ʔa isi tapeoha ho miʦu mee aemoʔ ʔe ʦeoju ho meoɓaŋo ta isi ʦu peoɓaŋa ʔe avʔu.

TRANSL.notes: 狗搖蜂窩,把(蜂窩)(搖了)掉下來,蜂四散飛,追那隻狗.

S.TRANSL: 狗搖蜂窩,把 掉下來,蜂四散飛,追那隻狗.

TRANSL.notes: The dog shook the (beehive) and caused (the beehive) fall. The bees scattered and chased the dog.

S.TRANSL: The dog shook the and caused fall. The bees scattered and chased the dog.

S.FORM: um isi yu'hanga to puku 'e oko.
S.PHON: um isi juʔhaŋa to puku ʔe oko.
S.FORM: um isi yu'hanga to puku 'e oko.
S.PHON: um isi juʔhaŋa to puku ʔe oko.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹討厭那小孩.
The owl hated the child.

S.FORM: isi n'a asngʉca ah peobanga ho ucia tupnui.
S.PHON: isi nʔa asŋɨʦa ah peoɓaŋa ho uʦia tupnui.
S.FORM: isi n'a asngʉca ah peobanga ho ucia tupnui.
S.PHON: isi nʔa asŋɨʦa ah peoɓaŋa ho uʦia tupnui.
S.TRANSL: 他一直追小孩想要啄他.

TRANSL.notes: (The owl) chased (the boy) and wanted to peck at him.

S.TRANSL: chased and wanted to peck at him.

S.FORM: eN ataveisi eh micu capo to meoi no fatu 'e oko ho.
S.PHON: en ataveisi eh miʦu ʦapo to meoi no fatu ʔe oko ho.
S.FORM: eN ataveisi eh micu capo to meoi no fatu 'e oko ho.
S.PHON: en ataveisi eh miʦu ʦapo to meoi no fatu ʔe oko ho.
S.TRANSL: 後來小孩爬上一塊大石頭.
Then the child climbed a rock.

S.FORM: aoka eoho'a 'e 'e na i'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: aoka eohoʔa ʔe ʔe na iʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: aoka eoho'a 'e 'e na i'o fo'kunge.
S.PHON: aoka eohoʔa ʔe ʔe na iʔo foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 他一直叫那青蛙.
He went on calling the frog.

S.FORM: eh pan to isi ti'eopi ci isi ta'unana evi eh 'iama eh sungu to 'ua 'o isi ti'eopi.
S.PHON: eh pan to isi tiʔeopi ʦi isi taʔunana evi eh ʔiama eh suŋu to ʔua ʔo isi tiʔeopi.
S.FORM: eh pan to isi ti'eopi ci isi ta'unana evi eh 'iama eh sungu to 'ua 'o isi ti'eopi.
S.PHON: eh pan to isi tiʔeopi ʦi isi taʔunana evi eh ʔiama eh suŋu to ʔua ʔo isi tiʔeopi.
S.TRANSL: 他抓著一個東西,他以為那是樹,原來是鹿的角.

TRANSL.notes: The boy thought he was holding a branch, (but it turned out to be) a deer's antler.

S.TRANSL: The boy thought he was holding a branch, a deer's antler.

S.FORM: isi cu uh micu msipngi to sungu to 'ua 'e oko isi cu hafa ta 'ua 'e.
S.PHON: isi ʦu uh miʦu msipŋi to suŋu to ʔua ʔe oko isi ʦu hafa ta ʔua ʔe.
S.FORM: isi cu uh micu msipngi to sungu to 'ua 'e oko isi cu hafa ta 'ua 'e.
S.PHON: isi ʦu uh miʦu msipŋi to suŋu to ʔua ʔe oko isi ʦu hafa ta ʔua ʔe.

TRANSL.notes: 那小孩卡在鹿的角上,鹿就帶著(孩子)跑.

S.TRANSL: 那小孩卡在鹿的角上,鹿就帶著 跑.
The child got stuck between the deer's antlers. He was carried by the deer.

S.FORM: oko ho 'a isi cu eh eh ciha ta na ita tʉ'nʉ.
S.PHON: oko ho ʔa isi ʦu eh eh ʦiha ta na ita tɨʔnɨ.
S.FORM: oko ho 'a isi cu eh eh ciha ta na ita tʉ'nʉ.
S.PHON: oko ho ʔa isi ʦu eh eh ʦiha ta na ita tɨʔnɨ.

TRANSL.notes: 那鹿(帶著小孩),把小孩摔落到懸崖.

S.TRANSL: 那鹿 ,把小孩摔落到懸崖.

TRANSL.notes: The deer (took the child and) threw him over the cliff.

S.TRANSL: The deer threw him over the cliff.

S.FORM: ah eaz maezo 'e av'u ho supeohʉ.
S.PHON: ah eaz maezo ʔe avʔu ho supeohɨ.
S.FORM: ah eaz maezo 'e av'u ho supeohʉ.
S.PHON: ah eaz maezo ʔe avʔu ho supeohɨ.
S.TRANSL: 狗也跟著掉下去.
The dog also fell down.

S.FORM: eN 'oc'ocic'o eh su' ta chumu 'e oko ho i'e av'u.
S.PHON: en ʔoʦʔoʦiʦʔo eh suʔ ta ʦhumu ʔe oko ho iʔe avʔu.
S.FORM: eN 'oc'ocic'o eh su' ta chumu 'e oko ho i'e av'u.
S.PHON: en ʔoʦʔoʦiʦʔo eh suʔ ta ʦhumu ʔe oko ho iʔe avʔu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和狗剛好掉到水裡去.
The child and the dog fell into the water.

S.FORM: eh micu um mia'unu maica 'e 'e oko um smopayo ta fnguusi 'e av'u em micu meac'ʉhʉ to mo na ito mo eaevia.
S.PHON: eh miʦu um miaʔunu maiʦa ʔe ʔe oko um smopajo ta fŋuusi ʔe avʔu em miʦu meaʦʔɨhɨ to mo na ito mo eaevia.
S.FORM: eh micu um mia'unu maica 'e 'e oko um smopayo ta fnguusi 'e av'u em micu meac'ʉhʉ to mo na ito mo eaevia.
S.PHON: eh miʦu um miaʔunu maiʦa ʔe ʔe oko um smopajo ta fŋuusi ʔe avʔu em miʦu meaʦʔɨhɨ to mo na ito mo eaevia.

TRANSL.notes: 小狗(坐)在小孩的頭上,他們漂流到有樹的地方.

S.TRANSL: 小狗 在小孩的頭上,他們漂流到有樹的地方.

TRANSL.notes: The dog (sat) on the child's head. They floated toward where there was a tree.

S.TRANSL: The dog on the child's head. They floated toward where there was a tree.

S.FORM: isicu enca 'e av'u o'te s'a aomotʉ'ʉ o'te s'a ea'ei.
S.PHON: isiʦu enʦa ʔe avʔu oʔte sʔa aomotɨʔɨ oʔte sʔa eaʔei.
S.FORM: isicu enca 'e av'u o'te s'a aomotʉ'ʉ o'te s'a ea'ei.
S.PHON: isiʦu enʦa ʔe avʔu oʔte sʔa aomotɨʔɨ oʔte sʔa eaʔei.
S.TRANSL: 他叫那狗不要講話."不要說話".

TRANSL.notes: He told the dog not to speak. "Don't speak. (Be quiet.)"

S.TRANSL: He told the dog not to speak. "Don't speak. "

W.TRANSL: 助動詞.非主焦-3SG.屬格=完成

S.FORM: 'ia isi enca 'e av'u o'te s'a muni.
S.PHON: ʔia isi enʦa ʔe avʔu oʔte sʔa muni.
S.FORM: 'ia isi enca 'e av'u o'te s'a muni.
S.PHON: ʔia isi enʦa ʔe avʔu oʔte sʔa muni.
S.TRANSL: 他跟那隻狗說不要出聲音.
He told the dog not to make any sound.

S.FORM: eh ihe cu eh micu capo ta c na ita ceaf'u ho na ita mo ea ta mo feongo ci ceaf'u ho eh ihe cu uh op'opeeveni 'o ciengona ta na ita ceaf'u.
S.PHON: eh ihe ʦu eh miʦu ʦapo ta ʦ na ita ʦeafʔu ho na ita mo ea ta mo feoŋo ʦi ʦeafʔu ho eh ihe ʦu uh opʔopeeveni ʔo ʦieŋona ta na ita ʦeafʔu.
S.FORM: eh ihe cu eh micu capo ta c na ita ceaf'u ho na ita mo ea ta mo feongo ci ceaf'u ho eh ihe cu uh op'opeeveni 'o ciengona ta na ita ceaf'u.
S.PHON: eh ihe ʦu eh miʦu ʦapo ta ʦ na ita ʦeafʔu ho na ita mo ea ta mo feoŋo ʦi ʦeafʔu ho eh ihe ʦu uh opʔopeeveni ʔo ʦieŋona ta na ita ʦeafʔu.

TRANSL.notes: 他們爬上一個(倒下的)枯樹幹,上面有一個洞.他們探頭看枯樹的另一邊.

S.TRANSL: 他們爬上一個 枯樹幹,上面有一個洞.他們探頭看枯樹的另一邊.
They climbed over a log. There was a hole in the log, and they peeked to the other side.

S.FORM: eh ihe cu eh teolʉi 'o mo yuso ci fo'kunge mo noepohʉ ta f'uf'u ta na ita ceaf'u.
S.PHON: eh ihe ʦu eh teoɗɨi ʔo mo juso ʦi foʔkuŋe mo noepohɨ ta fʔufʔu ta na ita ʦeafʔu.
S.FORM: eh ihe cu eh teolʉi 'o mo yuso ci fo'kunge mo noepohʉ ta f'uf'u ta na ita ceaf'u.
S.PHON: eh ihe ʦu eh teoɗɨi ʔo mo juso ʦi foʔkuŋe mo noepohɨ ta fʔufʔu ta na ita ʦeafʔu.
S.TRANSL: 他們看見兩隻青蛙一起在枯樹底下.
They saw two frogs together under the log.

S.FORM: a aomane ihe cu aiti si mo n'a asuhcu man'i ci fo'kunge micu mo uso.
S.PHON: a aomane ihe ʦu aiti si mo nʔa asuhʦu manʔi ʦi foʔkuŋe miʦu mo uso.
S.FORM: a aomane ihe cu aiti si mo n'a asuhcu man'i ci fo'kunge micu mo uso.
S.PHON: a aomane ihe ʦu aiti si mo nʔa asuhʦu manʔi ʦi foʔkuŋe miʦu mo uso.
S.TRANSL: 過一會兒他們看到更多的青蛙.
After a while, they saw more frogs.

S.FORM: eh as eh imza aiti ah mais'a o 'o'okohe eh hoci no o'te 'oahngʉhe.
S.PHON: eh as eh imza aiti ah maisʔa o ʔoʔokohe eh hoʦi no oʔte ʔoahŋɨhe.
S.FORM: eh as eh imza aiti ah mais'a o 'o'okohe eh hoci no o'te 'oahngʉhe.
S.PHON: eh as eh imza aiti ah maisʔa o ʔoʔokohe eh hoʦi no oʔte ʔoahŋɨhe.
S.TRANSL: 像是那兩隻青蛙的小孩,要不然就是同類.

TRANSL.notes: (It was) like the two frogs' children, or relatives.

S.TRANSL: like the two frogs' children, or relatives.

S.FORM: eh 07 as eh imza aiti ah mais'a o 'o'okohe eh hoci no o'te 'oahngʉhe.
S.PHON: eh ** as eh imza aiti ah maisʔa o ʔoʔokohe eh hoʦi no oʔte ʔoahŋɨhe.
S.FORM: eh 07 as eh imza aiti ah mais'a o 'o'okohe eh hoci no o'te 'oahngʉhe.
S.PHON: eh ** as eh imza aiti ah maisʔa o ʔoʔokohe eh hoʦi no oʔte ʔoahŋɨhe.
S.TRANSL: 像是那兩隻青蛙的小孩,要不然就是同類.

TRANSL.notes: (It was) like the two frogs' children, or relatives.

S.TRANSL: like the two frogs' children, or relatives.

S.FORM: eN ihe cu isi cu aiti to oko 'o anana'osi 'o anana'osi iachi fo'kunge.
S.PHON: en ihe ʦu isi ʦu aiti to oko ʔo ananaʔosi ʔo ananaʔosi iaʦhi foʔkuŋe.
S.FORM: eN ihe cu isi cu aiti to oko 'o anana'osi 'o anana'osi iachi fo'kunge.
S.PHON: en ihe ʦu isi ʦu aiti to oko ʔo ananaʔosi ʔo ananaʔosi iaʦhi foʔkuŋe.
S.TRANSL: 男孩看到那原本是屬於他的青蛙.
The boy saw the frog which had belonged to him for a long time.

S.FORM: isi cu eh isi cu ea ho hafa maine'e.
S.PHON: isi ʦu eh isi ʦu ea ho hafa maineʔe.
S.FORM: isi cu eh isi cu ea ho hafa maine'e.
S.PHON: isi ʦu eh isi ʦu ea ho hafa maineʔe.
S.TRANSL: 他拿著那青蛙帶牠回家.

TRANSL.notes: He took (the frog) home.

S.TRANSL: He took home.

S.FORM: mo eh sutoyange ta na ita ceaf'u 'e mo'u eh mocmo ta fo'kunge ho ihe micu ni si mo conci fo fo'kunge ne ihe cu hafa.
S.PHON: mo eh sutojaŋe ta na ita ʦeafʔu ʔe moʔu eh moʦmo ta foʔkuŋe ho ihe miʦu ni si mo ʦonʦi fo foʔkuŋe ne ihe ʦu hafa.
S.FORM: mo eh sutoyange ta na ita ceaf'u 'e mo'u eh mocmo ta fo'kunge ho ihe micu ni si mo conci fo fo'kunge ne ihe cu hafa.
S.PHON: mo eh sutojaŋe ta na ita ʦeafʔu ʔe moʔu eh moʦmo ta foʔkuŋe ho ihe miʦu ni si mo ʦonʦi fo foʔkuŋe ne ihe ʦu hafa.
S.TRANSL: 其他的青蛙在枯樹上並排而坐,而他們就帶著那隻青蛙回家.

TRANSL.notes: The frogs lined up by the log and he took one frog (with him).

S.TRANSL: The frogs lined up by the log and he took one frog .
